calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-06-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:55am
Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent Lenaitchia Smith appearing in Pro Per, Appellant Lorna Ma Barnes appearing in Pro Per. Virginia Chaplene appears as a witness with Ms. Smith, Tony Barnes appears as a witness with Ms. Barnes. Parties proceed to present their respective cases in the narrative. Witnesses, previously sworn, testify as well.
10:25am
Parties conclude, and the matter is submitted. Since the evidence viewed by the Judge but not marked or identified it is retained by the Court.
